1: lo    inet 127.0.0.1/8 scope host lo\       valid_lft forever preferred_lft forever
2: dummy0    inet 169.254.0.1/16 brd 169.254.255.255 scope global dummy0\       valid_lft forever preferred_lft forever
3: wlan0    inet 192.168.1.42/24 brd 192.168.1.255 scope global wlan0\       valid_lft 86400sec preferred_lft 86400sec
